title: Math Knitting
summary: A math practice game where correct answers add yarn and help finish a knitted project.
description: Solve arithmetic problems to keep yarn flowing, grow the scarf, and complete the knitting project.
dateSource: earliest creation timestamp across project files

safety.privacy: Local-only play with no accounts, chat, sharing, or saved data.
safety.adultHelp: Adult help may be useful for younger players practicing arithmetic.
safety.notes: Wrong answers reduce yarn, so a gentler mode may be a future improvement.
